Appearances:
Plaintiff Parkmerced Investors Properties LLC is present. Represented by Julie Anderson.
Attorney Daniel Stern appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Samantha F. Sethna is present.
Attorney Kristin Messer representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B , for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of May-14-2012 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
